case_title: ZARUM ELLA VS A M WISS CO INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ZARUM ELLA AS TO DEFENDANT A M WISS CO INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
